buildCommand: node scripts/increment-version.mjs && prisma generate && next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),c=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/version.ts','utf8'),m=c.match(/VERSION_DISPLAY\s*=\s*'(.*?)'/);console.log('');console.log('=============================');console.log('  BUILD OK | '+m[1]+' ('+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+')');console.log('=============================');console.log('')"
